rules.notes: 1+ Wizard; 0-1 Vampire Count/Master Necromancer/Strigoi Ghoul King per 1,000 pts; 0-1 Wight King/Tomb Banshee per 1,000 pts; Vampire Thralls, Necromantic Acolytes, Wight Lords and Cairn Wraiths as desired
0-1 Vampire Count, Master Necromancer or Strigoi Ghoul King per 1,000 pts
0-1 Wight King or Banshee per 1,000 pts
Skeleton Warriors, Zombies, Crypt Ghouls, Bat Swarms and Dire Wolves; If army includes 1+ Wights, 0-1 unit of Grave Guard or Black Knights may be taken as a Core choice
0-1 unit of Grave Guard or Black Knights as a Core choice per Wight King or Wight Lord in the army
0-1 Grave Guard/Black Knights per 1,000 pts; 0-1 Crypt Horrors/Fell Bats per 1,000 pts; 0-3 Corpse Carts; 0-1 Spirit Hosts per Cairn Wraith or Tomb Banshee taken
0-1 unit of Grave Guard per 1,000 pts
0-1 unit of Black Knights per 1,000 pts
0-1 unit of Crypt Horrors or Fell Bats per 1,000 pts
0-1 unit of Spirit Hosts per Cairn Wraith or Tomb Banshee taken
If your General is a Strigoi Ghoul King, 0-1 unit of Vargheists may be taken as a Special choice
If your General is a Strigoi Ghoul King, 0-1 Terrorgheist may be taken as a Special choice
0-1 Vargheists per 1,000 pts; 0-2 Black Coaches; 0-1 Terrorgheist or Varghulf per 1,000 pts; 0-1 Blood Knights per 1,000 pts; 0-1 Hexwraiths per Cairn Wraith or Tomb Banshee taken
0-1 unit of Blood Knights per 1,000 pts
0-1 unit of Hexwraiths per Cairn Wraith or Tomb Banshee taken

weapon_profiles.name: Spectral scythe
weapon_profiles.notes: No armour save is permitted against wounds caused by this weapon (Ward and Regeneration saves can be attempted as normal).

units.name: Skeletal Steed
equipment: Skeletal hooves (counts as a hand weapon)

units.name: Nightmare
equipment: Iron-shod hooves (counts as a hand weapon)

units.name: Coven Throne
notes: Armour Value 4+. Character Mount only — points added to rider.
Random Attacks applies to Spirit Horde only.

units.name: Mortis Engine
notes: Armour Value 4+. Character Mount only — points added to rider.
Random Attacks applies to Spirit Horde only.

units.name: Abyssal Terror

weapon_profiles.name: Poisonous tail
weapon_profiles.notes: This model may make one of its attacks each turn with this weapon.

notes: Character Mount only — points added to rider.

units.name: Zombie Dragon
equipment: Draconic scales (counts as full plate armour)
notes: Character Mount only — points added to rider.

units.name: Bat Swarms
equipment: Claws and fangs (counts as a hand weapon)

units.name: Dire Wolves
equipment: Claws and fangs (counts as hand weapons)

units.name: Fell Bats
equipment: Claws and fangs (counts as a hand weapon)

units.name: Corpse Cart
notes: Armour Value 4+. Random Attacks applies to The Restless Dead only.
Corpse Cart must take one of: Balefire Brazier or Warped Tintinnabulation.

options.description: Replace heavy armour with full plate armour

units.name: Black Knights
notes: Cleaving Blow applies to Black Knights and Hell Knight only.

weapon_profiles.name: Spectral scythe
weapon_profiles.notes: No armour save is permitted against wounds caused by this weapon (Ward and Regeneration saves can be attempted as normal).

weapon_profiles.name: Rancid maw
weapon_profiles.notes: This model must make one of its attacks each turn with this weapon.

vampiric_powers.name: Curse of the Revenant
vampiric_powers.restrictions: Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: This Vampire has a +1 modifier to its Wounds characteristic.

vampiric_powers.name: Beguile
vampiric_powers.restrictions: Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: Enemy units must make a Leadership test before making any rolls To Hit against this Vampire during the Combat phase. If this test is failed, only rolls of a natural 6 will hit.

vampiric_powers.name: Flying Horror
vampiric_powers.restrictions: Models whose troop type is 'infantry' only. Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: This Vampire gains the Fly (10) rule, but cannot join a unit.

vampiric_powers.name: Dark Acolyte
vampiric_powers.restrictions: Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: This Vampire gains the Invocation of Nehek special rule. For the purposes of using this special rule, this model counts as a Level 1 Wizard.

vampiric_powers.name: Master of the Black Arts
vampiric_powers.restrictions: A Vampire Count that is a Level 2 Wizard, or a Vampire Thrall that is a Level 1 Wizard only. Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: This Vampire increases their Level of Wizardry by 1.

vampiric_powers.name: Supernatural Horror
vampiric_powers.restrictions: Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: This Vampire gains the Terror special rule.

vampiric_powers.name: Lord of the Night
vampiric_powers.restrictions: Each power may only be chosen once per army.
vampiric_powers.description: During the Command sub-phase of their turn, this Vampire may attempt to resurrect fallen creatures of the night by making a Leadership test (using their own Leadership). If this test is passed, a single friendly unit of Fell Bats, Bat Swarms or Dire Wolves that is within 12″ of this model recovers D6 lost Wounds.

magic_items.name: Frostblade
magic_items.description: A blade of blue ice-steel bound with deadly spells.
magic_items.rules_text: Any enemy model that suffers one or more unsaved wounds from the Frostblade must immediately make a Toughness test. If this test is failed, they gain the Strike Last special rule and must reduce their Initiative characteristic to 1 for the remainder of the game.

magic_items.name: Sword of Kings
magic_items.description: An accursed blade of ancient and ageless design that thirsts constantly for the souls of its wielder's enemies.
magic_items.rules_text: The wielder of the Sword of Kings strikes a Killing Blow if they roll a natural 5 or 6 when making a roll To Wound, rather than the usual 6.

magic_items.name: Blood Drinker
magic_items.description: This long, slender blade greedily drinks the blood of its victims, their life force revitalising its master.
magic_items.rules_text: If the wielder of Blood Drinker causes one or more unsaved wounds during the Combat phase, they recover a single lost Wound.

magic_items.name: Dreadlance
magic_items.description: Once wielded by an infamous Vampire knight, this lance is uncannily accurate, said to find its target even in the dark of night.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is 'cavalry' or 'monster' only. The Dreadlance can only be used during a turn in which the wielder charged. In subsequent turns the model must use its hand weapon instead. The wielder of the Dreadlance may re-roll any failed rolls To Hit made whilst using it.
magic_items.restrictions: Models whose troop type is 'cavalry' or 'monster' only.

magic_items.name: The Flayed Hauberk
magic_items.description: Stitched from the flesh of countless victims, the wearer of the Flayed Hauberk is enshrouded and protected by the souls of the damned.
magic_items.rules_text: The Flayed Hauberk is a suit of heavy armour which may be worn by a Wizard without penalty. In addition, its wearer has a 6+ Ward save against any wounds suffered.

armour_profile.notes: May be worn by a Wizard without penalty. Wearer has a 6+ Ward save.

magic_items.name: The Accursed Armour
magic_items.description: Some strange flaw renders the wearer of this armour resilient beyond measure, yet robs them of dexterity.
magic_items.rules_text: Models whose troop type is 'infantry' or 'cavalry' only. The Accursed Armour is a suit of full plate armour. In addition, its wearer has a +1 modifier to their Toughness characteristic, but suffers a -1 modifier to their Weapon Skill and Initiative characteristics (to a minimum of 1).
magic_items.restrictions: Models whose troop type is 'infantry' or 'cavalry' only.

magic_items.name: Von Carstein Ring
magic_items.description: An ancient heirloom of the lords of Sylvania, this ring is known to make a Vampire carrying it almost impossible to kill.
magic_items.rules_text: Vampires only. Single use. When the wearer of the Von Carstein Ring loses their last Wound, roll a D6. On a roll of 2+, the Wound is not lost.

magic_items.name: Crown of the Damned
magic_items.description: The wearer of the Crown of the Damned draws revitalising energies from the spirits imprisoned within it, but at times their eternal wailing can become overpowering.
magic_items.rules_text: The Crown of the Damned gives its wearer a 4+ Ward save against any wounds suffered. However, due to the wailing of the spirits trapped within the crown, its wearer is also subject to the Stupidity special rule.

magic_items.name: Helm of Commandment
magic_items.description: This ancient and corroded helmet can be used to infuse Undead servants with the wearer's sentience, making them formidable fighters.
magic_items.rules_text: Necromancers and Wights only. During the Command sub-phase of their turn, this character may attempt to enhance the sentience of those around them by making a Leadership test (using their own Leadership). If this test is passed, until your next Start of Turn sub-phase this character and any unit they have joined gains a +D3 modifier to their Weapon Skill characteristic (to a maximum of 10).

magic_items.name: Hand of Dust
magic_items.description: The severed hand of the Great Necromancer himself — the mere proximity of this withered appendage can drain all life and vitality from mortals, leaving them as desiccated husks.
magic_items.rules_text: Necromancers only. This model can cast the following Bound spell, with a Power Level of 2. Roll a D6 each time the Hand of Dust is used. On a roll of 1, it crumbles to dust and cannot be used again. Type: Assailment. Casting Value: 9+. Range: Combat. Effect: The target enemy unit suffers 2D6 Strength 5 hits, each with an AP of -1.

magic_items.name: Cloak of Mist & Shadows
magic_items.description: This cloak frees the wearer from the bonds of their physical form, allowing them to move through solid matter like a ghost.
magic_items.rules_text: Necromancers whose troop type is 'infantry' only. The wearer of the Cloak of Mist & Shadows gains the Ethereal special rule.
magic_items.restrictions: Necromancers whose troop type is 'infantry' only.

magic_items.name: Skull Staff
magic_items.description: The Skull Staff constantly whispers to its bearer, revealing the secrets of their foes and predicting the ebb and flow of the Winds of Magic.
magic_items.rules_text: The bearer of the Skull Staff increases their Dispel range by 3″ and, when attempting a Wizardly dispel, may apply a +1 modifier to their Dispel roll. Note that this is a modifier to the result of a roll — it does not negate a roll of a natural double 1.

magic_items.name: Sceptre of De Noirot
magic_items.description: The Necromancer de Noirot suffered a terrible demise when he invoked the power of the sceptre and raised more of the Undead than he could control.
magic_items.rules_text: Necromancers only. The bearer of the Sceptre of De Noirot may attempt to resurrect the fallen by using the Invocation of Nehek special rule twice during their Command sub-phase (rather than the usual once). Roll a D6 each time the sceptre is used. On a roll of 1, the bearer loses a single Wound.

magic_items.name: Spell Familiar*
magic_items.description: A spell familiar memorises a spell on its master's behalf, constantly rehearsing for its big moment until it is called upon to share its arcane knowledge.
magic_items.rules_text: 0-1 per Wizard. The owner of a Spell Familiar knows one more spell (chosen in the usual way) than is normal for their Level of Wizardry. Note that this does not increase the Wizard's Level.

magic_items.name: Banner of the Barrows
magic_items.description: Woven from the wind and the cold, the chill of this banner touches the hearts of those who stand before it.
magic_items.rules_text: Wight Lord Battle Standard Bearer only. During the Combat phase, when a unit carrying the Banner of the Barrows makes a roll To Hit, a roll of 3+ is always a success, regardless of the target's Weapon Skill.
magic_items.restrictions: Wight Lord Battle Standard Bearer only.

magic_items.name: Drakenhof Banner
magic_items.description: The infamous Count Vlad von Carstein had thrall Necromancers enchant his household standard to sustain his bodyguard.
magic_items.rules_text: If a unit carrying the Drakenhof Banner has the Regeneration (X+) special rule, it improves the armour value of its Regeneration save by 1.

magic_items.name: The Screaming Banner
magic_items.description: Even the bravest warriors tremble in the presence of a haunted banner that wails a constant dirge.
magic_items.rules_text: When an enemy unit makes a Leadership test due to Fear caused by a unit carrying the Screaming Banner, it must roll an extra D6 and discard the lowest result.

magic_items.name: Standard of Hellish Vigour
magic_items.description: The restless essence of the Vampire whose flesh was flayed to craft this banner invigorates the Undead nearby.
magic_items.rules_text: A unit carrying the Standard of Hellish Vigour gains the Reserve Move special rule.

lore_of_undeath.name: Vanhal's Danse Macabre
lore_of_undeath.effect: If this spell is cast with a casting result of 8 or more, the target friendly unit gains a +D3 modifier to one of the following characteristics (to a maximum of 10). If this spell is cast with a casting result of 12 or more, the target friendly unit gains a +D3 modifier to two of the following characteristics (to a maximum of 10). This spell lasts until your next Start of Turn sub-phase. Movement; Weapon Skill; Initiative.

lore_of_undeath.name: Hellish Vigour
lore_of_undeath.effect: If this spell is cast with a casting result of 7 or more, a single friendly unit that has the Necromantic Undead special rule and is within the caster's Command range gains the Reserve Move special rule. If this spell is cast with a casting result of 10 or more, every friendly unit that has the Necromantic Undead special rule and is within the caster's Command range gains the Reserve Move special rule. This spell lasts until the end of this turn.

lore_of_undeath.name: Raise Dead
lore_of_undeath.effect: Place a unit of 2D3 Risen Zombies on the battlefield anywhere completely within 12″ of this model, but not within 1″ of any enemy models. This unit cannot declare a charge during the turn in which it was raised. Risen Zombies: M4 WS2 BS0 S3 T3 W1 I1 A1 Ld2. Regular infantry. 25×25mm. Hand weapons. Special Rules: Necromantic Undead, Regeneration (6+), Skirmishers, the Newly Dead. Note: Risen Zombies are not worth any Victory Points.
